name: gh-issue-drafter
description: Draft structured GitHub issues from loose notes, review comments, or partially written issue text. Use when you need to create, rewrite, or standardize a GitHub issue with a separate title and a concise body using Situation, Direction, Acceptance Criteria, Validation, and optional References. Trigger this skill for requests such as create an issue, structure this issue, turn notes into an issue, write acceptance criteria, write validation steps, or make an issue body clearer and objectively verifiable.
